title: RamseyOS Reflection Entry
description: A personal reflection, intention, or journal entry. Supports daily reflection practice and connects to the Daily Card system.

date.description: The date this reflection is associated with (YYYY-MM-DD).

intention.description: A short intention statement for the day. Primarily used with morning-intention entries.

workspaceId.description: Optional workspace context if the reflection is workspace-specific.

projectId.description: Optional project context if reflecting on a specific project.

dailyCardDate.description: Reference to the Daily Card this reflection relates to. Usually matches date.

isPrivate.description: Whether this entry should be excluded from any AI processing. Defaults to true.
